description: Bidirectional related_characters mirror. The Vivid Voltage Charizard (VIV-025) Royal Blaze attack mechanically scales by Leon-card-discard-pile count, a designer-coded citation of the canonical Leon / Gigantamax Charizard pairing where Galar Champion Leon's signature Pokemon IS Charizard. Edge anchors at the cross-node-cohort layer: the Charizard species line and the Galar Pokemon League institution intersect canonically through Leon, and the mechanical citation on VIV-025 makes the link load-bearing rather than thematic. Third instance of the related_characters schema. Acceptable mirror, professional sigh deployed.
citations: [PokemonTCG.io: VIV-025 Charizard Royal Blaze attack rules text]
